name: UMOZ
description: An ultra-lightweight, high-performance Arduino multitasking framework featuring a priority-based background scheduler, macro-driven non-blocking timers, real-time CPU profiling, and zero-overhead analog smoothing.
keywords: multitasking, scheduler, task-manager, cpu-profiling, benchmark, non-blocking, timing, fast-adc, ema-filter, hardware-debounce, rtos, micro-rtos
